summary: Dashboard displays core functionality with proper mobile layout and beta messaging, but uses generic UI palette instead of required diner brand treatment for authenticated surfaces.

violations.description: Authenticated dashboard surface uses generic gray/neutral UI palette instead of maintaining brand consistency with public diner palette. Background appears generic rather than using cream (#fff8ea) or other brand colors.

Public marketing palette and signed-in app chrome should remain visually separated but coherent. Current implementation shows complete visual divergence rather than intentional separation within a unified brand system.

actions: Apply consistent brand palette to authenticated surfaces while maintaining visual separation from public marketing chrome
Update dashboard background and card treatments to use cream (#fff8ea) or other defined brand colors
Ensure authenticated UI maintains diner aesthetic coherence without directly copying public marketing styles
